author: lOrm
content: Fixed in commit 3389b6b6 (src/hooks/mod.rs): added HookEvent::is_deny_intent() returning true for PreToolUse + PermissionRequest only. matches_entry now takes event: HookEvent and chooses default by intent — deny-intent fail CLOSED (return true so hook runs), observe-intent fail OPEN. Both paths emit tracing::warn! with structured event=, pattern=, error=, fail_closed= fields. 5 regression tests added. cargo test --lib hooks::: 65 passed; clippy -- -D warnings: exit 0.
